about.title: About ZiroCode
about.whoWeAreContent: ZiroCode is a professional AI model API gateway service platform, dedicated to providing developers with unified, stable, and efficient AI model access solutions.
about.missionContent: Make AI technology more accessible, reliable, and economical. We believe that by providing a unified API gateway, we can significantly reduce the complexity and cost for developers to integrate multiple AI models.

advantagesItems.title: Unified API
advantagesItems.description: Compatible with OpenAI API format, one codebase for all major models

advantagesItems.title: High Availability
advantagesItems.description: Multi-node deployment with intelligent load balancing for stable service

advantagesItems.title: Cost Optimization
advantagesItems.description: Flexible pricing strategies to help developers reduce AI costs

advantagesItems.title: Fast Response
advantagesItems.description: Optimized network architecture for faster API response times

advantagesItems.title: Full Support
advantagesItems.description: Professional technical support team to resolve your issues promptly

about.supportedModelsContent: We support mainstream AI model providers in the industry, including:
useCasesItems: AI App Development: Quickly integrate multiple AI capabilities
Smart Customer Service: Build efficient chatbots
Data Analysis: Intelligent data processing and insights
Education & Training: AI-assisted learning and teaching
about.contactContent: If you have any questions, suggestions, or cooperation intentions, please contact us through the following methods:
contactItems: Ticket System: Submit tickets after logging in
Documentation: View detailed API docs and guides

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By using ZiroCode services, you agree to comply with these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

sections.title: 2. Account Registration
items: You must provide accurate and complete registration information
You are responsible for maintaining account security and password confidentiality
You are responsible for all activities under your account
Sharing or transferring accounts is prohibited

sections.title: 3. Service Usage Guidelines
sections.content: When using our services, you agree to:
items: Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
Not engage in any illegal, fraudulent, or abusive activities
Not interfere with or disrupt the normal operation of services
Not attempt unauthorized access to systems or data
Not use the service for spamming or malicious attacks

sections.title: 4. API Usage Limits
items: Comply with API rate limits
Do not abuse or overuse API resources
Do not expose or share API keys with third parties
Use quota reasonably to avoid wasting resources

sections.title: 5. Paid Services
items: Paid services are charged according to published prices
We reserve the right to adjust prices at any time
Refund policy is subject to specific service terms
Non-payment may result in service suspension

sections.title: 6. Intellectual Property
sections.content: ZiroCode services and all content, features, and functionality are the property of us or our licensors and are protected by intellectual property laws.

sections.title: 7. Disclaimer
items: Services are provided 'as is' without any express or implied warranties
We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service
We are not liable for losses caused by using the service

sections.title: 8. Service Changes and Termination
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or terminate services at any time. We may suspend or terminate accounts for violations of terms.

sections.title: 9. Terms Modifications
sections.content: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of modified terms.

sections.title: 10. Contact Information
sections.content: For any questions about these terms, please contact us through the ticket system.

sections.title: 1. Information Collection
sections.content: We collect information you provide when using ZiroCode services, including but not limited to:
items: Account information: email address, username, and other registration details
Usage data: API call records, usage statistics
Technical information: IP address, browser type, device information

sections.title: 2. Use of Information
sections.content: We use the collected information to:
items: Provide and improve our services
Process your requests and transactions
Send service notifications and updates
Protect service security and prevent fraud

sections.title: 3. Information Protection
sections.content: We take reasonable security measures to protect your personal information, including:
items: Encrypted data transmission and storage
Access control and permission management
Regular security audits

sections.title: 4. Information Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information only in the following circumstances:
items: With your explicit consent
As required by law
To protect our legitimate rights

sections.title: 5. Cookie Usage
sections.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve user experience and analyze service usage. You can manage cookies through your browser settings.

sections.title: 6. Your Rights
items: Access and update your personal information
Delete your account and data
Object to certain data processing
Export your data

sections.title: 7. Policy Updates
sections.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be notified via email or website announcements.

sections.title: 8. Contact Us
sections.content: For any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us through the ticket system.
